# Isha Health — Online Ketamine Therapy
> Physician-led at-home ketamine-assisted therapy for depression, anxiety, PTSD, and other mood disorders. Available via telemedicine in AZ, CA, CO, FL, GA, NY, OR, TX, and WA.

## About
Isha Health is a telehealth practice offering personalized ketamine-assisted therapy. Founded by Mai Shimada, MD, a board-certified physician with over 10 years of experience. 86% of members with moderate to severe symptoms report feeling better within 3 months.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://isha.health
- Pricing: https://isha.health/pricing
- Appointment: https://isha.health/appointment
- Complete Guide: https://isha.health/guide/ketamine-therapy
- Depression Guide: https://isha.health/guide/ketamine-for-depression
- Provider Guide: https://isha.health/guide/choosing-ketamine-provider
- Blog: https://isha.health/blog
- Resources: https://isha.health/resources
- Clinician Directory: https://isha.health/ketamine-therapist-directory
- Sitemap: https://isha.health/sitemap.xml

## Conditions Treated
- Depression: https://isha.health/ketamine-therapy-for-depression
- Anxiety: https://isha.health/ketamine-therapy-for-anxiety
- PTSD: https://isha.health/conditions/ptsd
- Treatment-Resistant Depression: https://isha.health/conditions/treatment-resistant-depression
- OCD: https://isha.health/conditions/ocd
- Bipolar Depression: https://isha.health/conditions/bipolar-depression
- Chronic Pain: https://isha.health/conditions/chronic-pain
- Postpartum Depression: https://isha.health/conditions/postpartum-depression
- Suicidal Ideation: https://isha.health/conditions/suicidal-ideation
- Alcohol Use Disorder: https://isha.health/conditions/alcohol-addiction

## Treatment Comparisons
- Ketamine vs Antidepressants: https://isha.health/compare/ketamine-vs-antidepressants
- Ketamine vs TMS: https://isha.health/compare/ketamine-vs-tms
- Ketamine vs ECT: https://isha.health/compare/ketamine-vs-ect
- Oral vs IV Ketamine: https://isha.health/compare/oral-ketamine-vs-iv-infusion
- Spravato vs Generic: https://isha.health/compare/spravato-vs-generic-ketamine
- At-Home vs Clinic: https://isha.health/compare/at-home-ketamine-vs-clinic
- Ketamine vs Psilocybin: https://isha.health/compare/ketamine-vs-psilocybin

## Key Facts
- Initial consultation: $350 (60 minutes with a physician)
- Follow-up: $350 (30 minutes)
- Medication: $50-150/month from compounding pharmacy
- HSA/FSA accepted
- Available in 9 states: AZ, CA, CO, FL, GA, NY, OR, TX, WA
- 195 clinicians in the directory
- 86% positive response rate in patients with moderate to severe symptoms
- No in-person visit required — fully telehealth

## Contact
- Email: info@isha.health
- Location: San Francisco, California
- Website: https://isha.health
